narrative:
Precinct West Park (precinct in Jefferson County) has 830 registered voters, with 58.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.0%, a modest Republican lean of 3.4 percentage points.
